# Soft62 Async50 Hard88 Contract

## Soft 62
full compaction soft trigger defaults to 0.62 so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Async 50
async background compaction and swarm micro pressure start at 0.50 so pre-rot reclaim begins sooner

## Hard 88
full compaction hard block defaults to 0.88 so long sessions stop earlier near the window while still leaving summary room

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status vitest
